mapper.select: /* getRefreshTokenByUser */ SELECT rt.refresh_tokens_id, rt.member_id, rt.refresh_token , rt.expire_dt, me.user_id FROM refresh_tokens rt INNER JOIN member me ON me.member_id = rt.member_id WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken}

/* getRefreshTokenByMemberId */ SELECT rt.refresh_tokens_id, rt.member_id, rt.refresh_token , rt.expire_dt, me.user_id FROM refresh_tokens rt INNER JOIN member me ON me.member_id = rt.member_id WHERE rt.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: /* deleteRefreshTokenById */ DELETE FROM refresh_tokens WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
/* deleteRefreshToken */ DELETE FROM refresh_tokens WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND refresh_token = #{refreshToken}
